title: Fastenal Company Announces Conference Call to Review 2023 Third Quarter Earnings
text: WINONA, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) announced the date and time for its conference call to review 2023 third quarter results, as well as current operations. The conference call will be broadcast live over the Internet on Thursday, October 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. central time. title: Fastenal: Intriguing Story But Too Steep Price
text: Fastenal Company manufactures and sells industrial and construction supplies to businesses. The company has demonstrated impressive long-term financial performance with stable growth and margins. The current valuation of the stock is excessively high with a significant DCF model downside, leading to a sell-rating at the current price.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch in the Strong Retail Building Products Industry
text: Digital initiatives, continued innovation, and strong Pro and DIY demand have been aiding the Retail Building Products industry players. HD, LOW, FAST and BLDR are well-poised for growth.

title: Fastenal (FAST) to Perform Trial of Select Fleet Trucks to EVs
text: Fastenal (FAST) intends to become a driver of innovation and efficiency in the commercial transportation system.

title: Fastenal Launches Operational Trial to Electrify Select Fleet Trucks
text: WINONA, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) has begun an operational trial with e-mobility solutions provider ZEVX™ to convert select pickup trucks in its final-mile delivery fleet to electric vehicles. Having completed a proof-of-concept trial with a single converted vehicle, Fastenal and ZEVX are now conducting a six-state trial using the ZEVX battery electric powertrain and power system products to electrify up to 16 trucks in 2023. The trial reflects Fastenal's ongoing c.

title: Fastenal Selects ZEVX for Operational Trial to Electrify Select Fleet Trucks
text: Industrial Supply Leader Adopts Best-in-Class EV Battery System Technology & Commercial Powertrains to Lower the Environmental Impact of its Fleet and Realize Operational Efficiencies GILBERT, Ariz. , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) has selected ZEVX™, a worldwide leader in intelligent electric vehicle (EV) systems, for an operational trial to convert pickup trucks in its fleet to EVs.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Closing In On A Historic First Year
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 0.57% in August, outperforming the S&P 500 by 1.02%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.07%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 3.95% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Is Fastenal's Business Sending Warning Signs to Investors? 3 Things to Watch
text: Fastenal sells fasteners and tools used in manufacturing and construction. The business is cyclical, and right now it is starting to show signs of weakness.
